error_signature: multipart/form-data handling issue in community nodes
title: Handling multipart/form-data in WoodWing community node
symptom: The WoodWing community node fails to upload files due to restrictions on using external libraries for multipart/form-data requests.
applies_when: Need to upload files via multipart/form-data
root_cause: Community nodes in n8n cannot use external libraries like 'form-data' for cloud compatibility, which complicates the implementation of file uploads that require multipart/form-data encoding.
fix_steps: Manually construct the multipart/form-data body using a custom boundary.
Set the appropriate headers and body in the HTTP request options.
agent_instruction: Manually create the multipart/form-data request body for file uploads in your community node.
